parameters.jsCode:
var p = $('02. Parser').first().json;
var tid = p.tenantId;
var query = `SELECT json_build_object(
  'campaigns', json_build_object(
    'total', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}'),
    'brouillon', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}' AND status = 'brouillon'),
    'planifiee', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}' AND status = 'planifiee'),
    'envoyee', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}' AND status = 'envoyee'),
    'total_envoyes', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_envoyes), 0) FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}'),
    'total_ouverts', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_ouverts), 0) FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}'),
    'total_cliques', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_cliques), 0) FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}'),
    'total_bounces', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_bounces), 0) FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}'),
    'total_desabonnes', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_desabonnes), 0) FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}')
  ),
  'subscribers', json_build_object(
    'total', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}'),
    'active', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}' AND status = 'active'),
    'unsubscribed', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}' AND status = 'unsubscribed'),
    'bounced', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}' AND status = 'bounced'),
    'new_last_30_days', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'),
    'total_lists', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscriber_lists WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}')
  ),
  'sms', json_build_object(
    'total', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sms_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}'),
    'total_envoyes', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_envoyes), 0) FROM sms_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}'),
    'total_delivered', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_delivered), 0) FROM sms_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}'),
    'total_failed', (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_failed), 0) FROM sms_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}')
  ),
  'templates', json_build_object(
    'total', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM email_templates WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}')
  ),
  'recent_campaigns', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(sub)), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT id, nom, sujet, status, scheduled_at, sent_at, total_envoyes, total_ouverts, total_cliques FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5) sub),
  'avg_open_rate', (SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(total_envoyes), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(total_ouverts), 0)::numeric / SUM(total_envoyes)::numeric * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}' AND status = 'envoyee'),
  'avg_click_rate', (SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(total_envoyes), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(total_cliques), 0)::numeric / SUM(total_envoyes)::numeric * 100, 1) ELSE 0 END FROM email_campaigns WHERE tenant_id = '${tid}' AND status = 'envoyee')
) AS dashboard`;
return [{json:{query}}];
